policies.inbound:
<rate-limit-by-key
            calls="60"
            renewal-period="60"
            counter-key="@(context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Mcp-Session-Id", context.Request.IpAddress))"
            increment-condition="@(context.Response.StatusCode >= 200 && context.Response.StatusCode < 400)" />
        
        
            @{
                var sessionId = context.Request.Headers.GetValueOrDefault("Mcp-Session-Id", "no-session");
                return $"MCP Request | Session: {sessionId} | Method: {context.Request.Method} | Path: {context.Request.Url.Path}";
            }
        
        
        
            
                <set-variable name="mcp-request-body" value="@(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
                
                
                    
                        
                        
                        <set-variable name="mcp-filter-blocked" value="@{
                            var primitiveType = (string)context.Variables["mcp-primitive-type"];
                            var name = (string)context.Variables["mcp-primitive-name"];
                            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(name)) return "false";

                            var serverName = context.Api.Id.Replace("-api", "");
                            string configJson;
                            try {
                                configJson = "{{mcp-primitives-" + serverName + "}}";
                            } catch {
                                return "false";
                            }
                            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(configJson) || configJson.StartsWith("{{")) return "false";

                            try {
                                var config = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(configJson);
                                var filter = config[primitiveType];
                                if (filter == null) return "false";
                                var policy = filter["policy"]?.ToString() ?? "allowAll";

                                if (policy == "denyAll") return "true";
                                if (policy == "allowAll") return "false";

                                if (policy == "denyList") {
                                    var denied = filter["denied"]?.ToObject() ?? new string[0];
                                    foreach (var d in denied) {
                                        if (d.EndsWith("*") ? name.StartsWith(d.TrimEnd('*')) : name == d)
                                            return "true";
                                    }
                                    return "false";
                                }
                                if (policy == "allowList") {
                                    var allowed = filter["allowed"]?.ToObject() ?? new string[0];
                                    foreach (var a in allowed) {
                                        if (a.EndsWith("*") ? name.StartsWith(a.TrimEnd('*')) : name == a)
                                            return "false";
                                    }
                                    return "true";
                                }
                                return "false";
                            } catch { return "false"; }
                        }" />
                        
                            
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        application/json
                                    
                                    @{
                                        var body = (string)context.Variables["mcp-request-body"];
                                        var id = "null";
                                        try { id = Newtonsoft.Json.Linq.JObject.Parse(body)["id"]?.ToString() ?? "null"; } catch {}
                                        var pType = (string)context.Variables["mcp-primitive-type"];
                                        var pName = (string)context.Variables["mcp-primitive-name"];
                                        return $"{{\"jsonrpc\":\"2.0\",\"id\":{id},\"error\":{{\"code\":-32600,\"message\":\"Blocked by governance policy: {pType}/{pName} is not allowed on this gateway.\"}}}}";
                                    }
